conversations.title: Amazing places
conversations.subtitle: Section A · Let's talk
conversations.instruction: Zhang Peng is talking with Peter. Listen and read the conversation.

lines.speaker: zhang_peng
lines.text: Hi, Peter! How was your weekend?

lines.speaker: peter
lines.text: Not too bad, thanks. And you?

lines.speaker: zhang_peng
lines.text: It was great! I climbed the Great Wall.

lines.speaker: peter
lines.text: Wow! The Great Wall is amazing.

lines.speaker: zhang_peng
lines.text: Yes, it is! It's 21,000 kilometres in all. What did you do, Peter?

lines.speaker: peter
lines.text: I visited the "Gingerbread House" last Saturday.

lines.speaker: zhang_peng
lines.text: What did you do there? Eat gingerbread?

lines.speaker: peter
lines.text: Ha! Ha! No! It's a beautiful train station in New Zealand.

lines.speaker: zhang_peng
lines.text: That sounds interesting. Please send me some pictures.

questions.prompt: What did the boys do last weekend?
What facts do you learn from their conversation?

conversations.title: Amazing places
conversations.subtitle: Section B · Let's talk
conversations.instruction: Binbin and Sarah meet Amy at school. Listen and read the conversation.

lines.speaker: amy
lines.text: Where did you go over the summer holidays, Binbin?

lines.speaker: binbin
lines.text: I went to Xi'an with my family.

lines.speaker: sarah
lines.text: I like Xi'an very much. What did you do there?

lines.speaker: binbin
lines.text: We ate some famous Xi'an noodles. Then we went to see the Terracotta Warriors.

lines.speaker: sarah
lines.text: Wow! I really want to go there! How was it?

lines.speaker: binbin
lines.text: Amazing! There are over seven thousand clay warriors and one hundred horses.

lines.speaker: amy
lines.text: I saw pictures on the internet. What else did you do?

lines.speaker: binbin
lines.text: Well, we walked around the old city and rode bikes on the old city wall.

lines.speaker: amy
lines.text: That sounds great fun!

questions.prompt: Where did Binbin go over the summer holidays?
What did Binbin eat in Xi'an?
How many clay warriors did Binbin see?

conversations.title: Amazing places
conversations.subtitle: Section B · Listen (before Let's talk)
conversations.instruction: Binbin and Sarah meet Amy at school. Listen and write T (True) or F (False).

lines.speaker: amy
lines.text: I took a trip to Shanghai over the summer holidays. The view from the tower was great!

lines.speaker: sarah
lines.text: That sounds wonderful! My cousin John went to Guiyang. It rained every day, so the weather wasn't very good.

lines.speaker: amy
lines.text: Oh, that's too bad. I hope he still had fun.

questions.prompt: The weather was good in Guiyang.
